scripts.test: npm --prefix ui test && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml
scripts.lint: npm --prefix ui run lint && cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
scripts.check: npm test && npm run lint && npm run ui:build
scripts.icons: echo "Icons live in src-tauri/icons (regenerate via repo script if needed)"
